name: Vehicle Assignment Process
description: Complete process for assigning a vehicle to a technician

substeps.title: Verify Enterprise ID is active
substeps.description: Check system to ensure Enterprise ID is valid and active

substeps.title: Confirm valid driver's license
substeps.description: Review driver's license expiration date and validity

substeps.title: Verify insurance coverage
substeps.description: Confirm technician has required insurance coverage

steps.title: Select Appropriate Vehicle
steps.description: Choose vehicle based on territory and requirements

substeps.title: Verify vehicle availability
substeps.description: Confirm selected vehicle is available for assignment

substeps.title: Match vehicle to territory needs
substeps.description: Ensure vehicle type matches territory requirements

substeps.title: Review maintenance status
substeps.description: Verify vehicle is in good condition and maintenance is current

substeps.title: Update vehicle status to 'assigned'
substeps.description: Change vehicle status in fleet management system

substeps.title: Link vehicle to technician profile
substeps.description: Create assignment record linking vehicle to technician

steps.title: Send Notifications
steps.description: Notify relevant parties of vehicle assignment

substeps.title: Send assignment confirmation to technician
substeps.description: Email technician with vehicle details and pickup instructions

substeps.title: Inform technician's supervisor
substeps.description: Send notification to supervisor about new vehicle assignment

substeps.title: Update fleet tracking dashboard
substeps.description: Ensure assignment appears on fleet management dashboard
